name: kotlin-patterns
description: Kotlin-specific patterns that aren't GoF: pattern matching (sealed + when), higher-order functions, Coroutines patterns (scope ownership, launch vs async, dispatchers, structured concurrency), Flow patterns (cold vs hot, operators), type-safe DSL builders, and a catalog of Kotlin anti-patterns. Grounded in Alexey Soshin's *Kotlin Design Patterns and Best Practices*, Section 2.
